2152150.name: Roxy Raccoon's Pinball Panic - Epic Egypt
2152150.description:
2 Brand New Tables with online leaderboards and unlockable cosmetics!

Ancient Egypt themed tables with multiple playfields.

Sand Sanctuary

  • Standard sized table with 1 upper playfield.
  • 6 Flippers, 2 Slingshots, 3 Bumpers, 2 Drop Targets, 4 Stationary Targets, 4 Rollovers, 4 Holes.
  • Ball Saver, Multiplier.

Foolish Pharaohs

  • Ultra-Wide table with 1 upper playfield.
  • 6 Flippers, 3 Slingshots, 9 Bumpers, 7 Drop Targets, 7 Teleporter Holes, 1 Raceway.
  • Multiplier.

Cosmetics

  • Handball: 1 new playable character based on the popular Egyptian sport (the ball handles the same, differences are visual only).
  • 6 Egyptian themed accessories.
  • 6 Furs, appropriate for the desert sands.
2152150.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 波兰语, 土耳其语, 意大利语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
